basic_details.job_title: ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Enhancing Climate Resilience of Indias Coastal Communities (ECRICC)
basic_details.short_information: Enhancing Climate Resilience of Indias Coastal Communities (ECRICC) Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website https://ganjam.odisha.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Graduation or Post Graduation in Agriculture, Post Graduate Degree in Agri Business Management, Post Graduate Degree in Agricultural Engineering. Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in agriculture sector interventions.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ganjam.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture post?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of the application is 18th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduation or Post Graduation in Agriculture, or a Post Graduate Degree in Agri Business Management or Agricultural Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 1 year of post-qualification experience in agriculture sector interventions is required for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves the shortlisting of applications received from eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the ECRICC Subject Matter Specialist (SMS)-Agriculture recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Ganjam, Odisha, which is https://ganjam.odisha.gov.in.
